title: rhinanthus crista-galli subsp. angustifolius
intro: Rhinanthus crista-galli subsp. angustifolius is a subspecies of flowering plant in the broomrape family, characterized by its narrow leaves and distinctive, horn-like shape. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Rhinanthus crista-galli subsp. angustifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
